rationale.R1.5: The agent provides a detailed critique and suggests reordering the section, which implies a coherent end-to-end plan for improvement.
rationale.RX.1: The agent identifies several gaps in support for claims without explicitly flagging uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the active set with specific recommendations for revisions.
rationale.RX.4: The critique does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content and addresses potential downstream harms effectively.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed feedback but does not trace every non-cosmetic change.
